results.description: Conductor is a Gemini CLI extension that allows you to specify, plan, and implement software features.

A curated library of high-quality, professionally crafted prompts for common development tasks. Save time and improve your AI interactions with battle-tested prompt templates. You can install it as an Gemini CLI Extension.
A Gemini CLI extension that allows you to use the Gemini CLI to orchestrate the Jules asynchronous agent to perform coding tasks like bug fixing, refactoring, and dependency updates.
Gemini CLI extension for Ralph loops
Universal tool to convert Claude Code skills to Gemini CLI extensions and vice versa
